name: Ahmad Zaki
favoriteMemory: Cooking Coto Makassar in the camp kitchen for 20 people. It was chaotic but tasted amazing.
funnyStory: Zack tried to speak English in his sleep and kept shouting 'Subject Verb Agreement!' at 3 AM.
personalQuote: Don't count the days, make the days count.

name: Sarah Amalia
favoriteMemory: Sitting under the mango tree talking about our future plans. She always had the best advice.
funnyStory: Getting caught speaking Sundanese by the tutor and having to do a chicken dance as a penalty.
personalQuote: Life is short, make every smile count.

name: Bima Wijaya
favoriteMemory: Renting bikes and racing down the main street of Pare at midnight under the streetlights.
funnyStory: He lost his sandal in the mud during a sudden rainstorm and walked home with only one shoe.
personalQuote: If you're not laughing, you're not living.

name: Dewi Lestari
favoriteMemory: Singing acoustic songs at the street food stall during the heavy rain. Her voice was like magic.
funnyStory: She ordered 'ice tea' but pronounced it like 'eyes tea' and the seller was extremely confused.
personalQuote: Music expresses that which cannot be said in words.

name: Fikri Syahputra
favoriteMemory: Playing football together. He was our star striker and always cheered everyone up.
funnyStory: Fikri tried to negotiate the price of a bicycle rental in English with an elderly Javanese lady.
personalQuote: Keep kicking forward, no matter what.
